changes: Fixed: Theme selection highlights are now correctly circular to match button shapes.
Improved: Theme Import/Export system with better icon mapping and duplicate palette detection.
Improved: Theme name collision handling - imported themes with existing names now get a counter suffix.
Refactored: Settings Screen code cleanup and performance optimizations for theme management.
New: Custom Themes system - fully personalize reader background and text colors.
New: Selectable Text - long-press reader content to copy or highlight.
New: Edit Book System - update titles, authors, and manage cover display settings.
Refactored: Settings Screen - completely redesigned for better clarity and organization.
Refactored: Reading Bar - polished visual hierarchy with theme-aware dynamic borders.
Refactored: System Bar Controls - improved visibility management for immersive reading.
Large PDF imports now appear in the library immediately and convert to EPUB in the background.
Added background PDF conversion progress with queued, running, ready, and failed states.
Improved PDF conversion performance with direct text extraction before OCR and disk-streamed page staging.
Books now keep raw-PDF fallback readable while conversion continues or fails.
Added PDF import with generated EPUB conversion and automatic raw-PDF fallback.
Separated EPUB and PDF progress persistence so switching reader modes no longer restores stale state.
Added reader actions to switch between generated EPUB and the original PDF from a single library item.
Improved parser self-healing for missing generated EPUB files and legacy PDF cache migration.
Improved overall app stability and reliability across the library, reader, and settings screens.
Refined book import and parsing behavior for better compatibility with more EPUB files and image paths.
Improved reading experience consistency with stronger restoration, theme, and navigation reliability.
Polished folder and library management flows for smoother day-to-day organization.
Added broader internal validation to reduce regressions and improve update stability.
Major architecture refactoring: Decoupled UI components from business logic for improved stability and maintainability.
Optimized Navigation: Transitioned to a centralized AppNavigation system for smoother screen switching and state management.
Enhanced Data Layer: Refined the integration between SettingsManager and the UI, ensuring consistent reactive updates across the app.
Performance Improvements: Faster library scanning and reduced memory footprint through more efficient EPUB metadata caching.
Refined Reader Logic: Improved chapter restoration and scroll position accuracy.
Fixed: Folder state desynchronization where library drawer wouldn't reflect changes from management dialogs immediately.
Improved: Drag-and-drop visual feedback in the library drawer with refined shadows and rounded corners.
Fixed: Visibility issues in OLED Dark theme when dragging unselected folders.
Improved: UI consistency by aligning drawer items with Material 3 pill-shaped design during interactions.
New: Folder system! Create, rename, delete, and organize folders with drag-and-drop sorting.
New: Bulk management for folders and books with selection mode and bottom action bar (Delete, Move To).
New: Each folder now maintains its own independent book sorting settings.
New: 'Recently Viewed' strip added to the library for quick access to your last-read books.
New: Favorite Folder support - set a default folder to load automatically on app startup.
Improved: Advanced Library sorting (Date, Title, Author, Chapters, Recents) with Ascending/Descending support.
Improved: Redesigned Book Cards and updated Library UI for better organization.
New: OLED Dark theme with pure black background for AMOLED screens.
Improved: Table of Contents and side drawer now respect all reader themes (Sepia, Dark, OLED).
Improved: "Previous Chapter" button now scrolls to the beginning of the chapter (consistent with "Next").
Added: Distinct 'O' icon for OLED theme selection in Settings and Reader controls.
New: Compact inline 'Go to Chapter' input inside the Table of Contents.
Fixed issue where the Table of Contents scrubber could become stuck at the top.
Fixed issue where some chapters would appear blank or truncated.
Improved XML parsing for EPUBs with non-standard HTML entities.
Enhanced reader stability with content-stable IDs for chapter elements.

Added support for common text formatting tags (
,
).
Better handling of SVG-wrapped images in chapters.
Improved Scrubber accuracy for shorter chapters.
Enhanced TOC navigation accessibility with wider touch targets.
Auto-dismiss controls when navigating via TOC or Scrubber.
Reworked UI element for Table of Contents
Added Welcome screen for fresh installs.
Implemented Chapter Navigation (Previous/Next) in reader controls.
Added scroll progress slider with percentage indicator.
Added version tracking and automatic changelog display.
Added Force LTR support for RTL languages.
Improved update logic for seamless transitions.
Enhanced TOC with header icons: Go to Chapter, Flipped Sort, and Locate Current.
Added Ascending/Descending chapter sorting that preserves list position.
Initial release of Blue Waves EPUB Reader.
Support for vertical scrolling and position restoration.
Customizable themes and fonts.
